response.overview: College is a time for exploration and experimentation, and for the incoming freshmen at Bi College Fucks this means discovering they can have as much fun with their buddies and bros as they can with the horniest coeds on campus. Experienced upperclassmen and sexy sorority girls break their freshman classmates in to hardcore bi action as Jamie and Kennedy seduce Ethan, Olivia and Ryder make Jensen go bi, Henry and Laura team up on Taft, and Jamie and Truman get Tobias to try bi in Volume 3 of BiCollegeFucks.com’s Freshman Initiation!
response.title: Freshman Initiation 3
